step_rationale: Canonical NET marker produced by PAD4-mediated histone modification.
mechanism: NETosis product serving as specific marker of neutrophil extracellular trap burden and pathogenic plaque inflammation.

references.title: Prothrombotic fibrin clot phenotype as a risk factor for persistent left ventricular thrombus following acute myocardial infarction.
references.journal: Journal of thrombosis and haemostasis : JTH

references.title: Linking Neutrophil Extracellular Traps and Platelet Activation: A Composite Biomarker Score for Predicting Outcomes after Acute Myocardial Infarction.
